title: COVID-19 data trends - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19 data trends
Data products about the public health, social and economic aspects of COVID-19, including disease surveillance. Links to datasets, dashboards, statistics, analyses, trends, charts, maps and reports.
- Canadian respiratory virus surveillance report
- COVID-19 virtual library of health data and evidence
- Downloadable data on COVID-19 across Canada
- Visual data gallery: COVID-19 graphs, charts, maps and more
- Summary data about travellers, testing and compliance
- COVID-19 wastewater surveillance dashboard
- Map of Canadian mental health during the COVID-19 pandemic
- Preliminary data tables related to confirmed cases (dataset)
- Confirmed cases in First Nations on reserve in provinces
- Mathematical modelling and COVID-19
- Number of people vaccinated in Canada
- Reported side effects following vaccination

## Specific populations
- Wider health impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic (interactive dashboard)
- Mental health during the COVID-19 pandemic (interactive dashboard)
- Impact of COVID-19 in adults with chronic conditions: Emergency department visits
- COVID-19 and the impact on services for       sexually transmitted and blood-borne infections
- COVID-19 and deaths in older Canadians: Excess mortality and the impacts of age and comorbidity
- Inequalities in the mental health of adults before and during the COVID-19 pandemic
- Social inequalities in COVID-19 deaths in Canada
- First Nations communities: Epidemiological summary
- COVID-19 infections among people working in healthcare settings
